name: All_Effort
sql: SELECT b.name as tipo, c.name as project, a.key as clave, a.assignee as aignado, a.customfield_10103 as sprint, a.customfield_11266 as producto, substr(a.created, 1, 19) as creacion, substr(a.updated, 1, 19) as actualizado, a.priority as prioridad, a.components as componentes, c.projectcategory_name as categoria, a.status as estado, a.customfield_11440 as QA_Asignado, a.labels as etiquetas, substr(a.resolved, 1, 19) as fechaResolucion, substr(a.customfield_11433, 1, 19) as RealEndDate, a.customfield_11798 as TestExecutionSource, a.customfield_11609 as TotalQAStoryPoints, a.customfield_11603 as QAStoryPoints, A.customfield_10105 AS StoryPoints FROM prd_hudi_rwz_cfn.jira_rwz_issues a inner join prd_hudi_rwz_cfn.jira_rwz_issuetypes b on (a.issuetype_id = b.id) inner join prd_hudi_rwz_cfn.jira_rwz_projects c on (a.project_id = c.id) where a.status_dl = 'true'

CalculatedField.EFFORT INVESTED IN SCRUM TEAMS (SPRINTS,: ifelse((tipo = 'Bug' OR tipo = 'Story' OR tipo = 'Technical Story'), QAStoryPoints, 0)
CalculatedField.internal effort: {INTERNAL INITIATIVES (OUT OF SPRINT)}+{EFFORT IN INTERNAL SPRINT}
CalculatedField.TEST EXECUTION (INTEGRATED TESTS, SHARED: ifelse((tipo='Test Execution' OR tipo = 'Sub Test Execution') AND (TestExecutionSource = 'Shared testing' OR TestExecutionSource = 'Integrated tests'  OR TestExecutionSource = 'Regression'), TotalQAStoryPoints, 0)
CalculatedField.other effort: {TEST EXECUTION (INTEGRATED TESTS, SHARED TESTING & REGRESSION)}+{EFFORT INVESTED IN SCRUM TEAMS (SPRINTS, SUPPORT KANBAN)}
CalculatedField.TOTAL EFFORT: {EFFORT INVESTED IN SCRUM TEAMS (SPRINTS, SUPPORT KANBAN)}+{TEST EXECUTION (INTEGRATED TESTS, SHARED TESTING & REGRESSION)}+{INTERNAL INITIATIVES (OUT OF SPRINT)}+{EFFORT IN INTERNAL SPRINT}
